title: Crispy Smoky Croatian Tofu Skewers
description: Spicy, crisp, plantbased Croatian skewers loaded with garlic granules and a smoky finish.
instructions: Drain and press the tofu to remove excess moisture, then cut into 2 cm cubes.
In a shallow dish whisk together garlic granules, smoked paprika, chili flakes, olive oil, tamari, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Add the tofu cubes to the mixture, tossing gently to coat; cover and marinate for at least 15 minutes.
Thread marinated tofu cubes onto skewers, spacing them so they cook evenly.
Preheat a grill or grill pan over medium heat and place a small pan of soaked wood chips under the heat source to generate smoke.
Sear the skewers, turning occasionally, until the tofu is golden and crisp, about 3–4 minutes per side.
During the last minute of cooking, add a few more wood chips to intensify the smoky aroma.
Remove the skewers, sprinkle with fresh parsley, and serve immediately.
